title: Just a Gigolo
writer: Alexander Engel, Alfred Grünwald, Frederic Hatton
actors: William Haines, Irene Purcell, C. Aubrey Smith
plot: Haines plays the role of a festive British nobleman whose relatives have arranged a marriage for him. He goes to a European summer resort and poses as a gigolo to meet the girl they have chosen, learn what she is like, and apply t...
